## Documentation Issue
What documentation needs improvement?

## Current State
What's wrong with the current documentation?
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Confusing/unclear
- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Poorly organized
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Affected Files
Which documentation files need updates?
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] ROADMAP.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] docs/ (user guides)
- [ ] planning/ (developer docs)
- [ ] Code comments/docstrings
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Proposed Changes
What should be changed, added, or removed?

## Target Audience
Who is this documentation for?
- [ ] End users (installing/using DevAudit)
- [ ] Contributors (adding features)
- [ ] Security learners (educational content)
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Additional Context
Links, screenshots, or examples
